evidence.snippet:
NDAA Certification
*   2025 EchoMAV EchoPilot AI NDAA certification documentation can be downloaded [here](https://echomav.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/EchoMAV-EchoPilot-NDAA-Certification-2025.pdf).
*   The EchoPilot AI hardware is NDAA Compliant. For Blue UAS certification, we recommend using the TAA compliant Xavier NX (Taiwan COO) or Orin NX (USA COO) in conjunction with the EchoPilot AI.

Is the EchoTherm NDAA Compliant? +
Yes! The EchoTherm is designed and manufactured in the USA.

ndaa.notes: EchoPilot AI has explicit 2025 NDAA certification documentation. EchoTherm explicitly NDAA compliant. MONARK built with NDAA-compliant electronics.

evidence.snippet: *   The EchoPilot AI hardware is NDAA Compliant. For Blue UAS certification, we recommend using the TAA compliant Xavier NX (Taiwan COO) or Orin NX (USA COO) in conjunction with the EchoPilot AI.

blue_uas.notes: Site recommends TAA-compliant Jetson modules for Blue UAS certification use-cases but does not claim EchoMAV products are on the DIU Blue UAS Cleared List.

evidence.snippet: Lead time for products is typically 6-8 weeks from when an order is placed.

tagline: Manufactures MONARK and MK1 tactical UAS airframes, plus EchoPilot AI flight control and thermal imaging modules for military and ISR applications. NDAA-compliant, production-ready, Lubbock-based. Blue UAS certification status unknown. Website emphasizes field modularity and operator-centric design; limited public technical detail on airframe specs, payload capacity, or fielded program lineage.
